description: Composition Black football shorts made of 100% polyster, adidas's signature three stripes along the sides in white, comfortable elastic waist band with inner drawstring, handy side pockets, embroidered brand name on the right leg, brand name and logo embroidered on the left leg on a yellow panel, and engineered with the ClimaLite technology Fitting Regular Washcare Machine wash in cold water below 30 Degrees Wash dark colours separately Do not soak, bleach or tumble dry Dry in shade Cool iron Do not iron on prints/trims/logo One look at these black football shorts from adidas will tell you how perfect they are for your matches. The white stripes running down both sides add that touch of vibrancy to them, while the side pockets are great for carrying essentials. The waist band is soft; for a more snug Fit you can use the internal drawstring too. Engineered with ClimaLite technology, the shorts draw sweat away from the skin to keep you dry and comfortable at all times.Team it with a smart tee and a pair of football studs and get ready to rule the field! Model statistics The model wears trousers, length of 41" Height-6", Waist-32"
